# moonbit-practice

> MoonBit code generation best practices. Use when writing MoonBit code to avoid common AI mistakes with syntax, tests, and benchmarks.

## Install

```bash
apm install mizchi/skills/lang/moonbit-practice
```

For a reproducible setup, declare it in `apm.yml` instead:

```yaml
dependencies:
  apm:
    - mizchi/skills/lang/moonbit-practice
```

then run `apm install`.

See [SKILL.md](./SKILL.md) for what this skill does and when to use it.
